incidentFields.description: Lead description updated by actor ID

incidentFields.description: Remediation actions related to the investigation

incidentFields.description: Checklist-style view of Expel remediations and their current statuses

incidentFields.description: Total remediation actions synced from Expel

incidentFields.description: Number of open remediation actions synced from Expel

incidentFields.description: Number of completed remediation actions synced from Expel

incidentFields.description: Toggle to run the on-demand Expel sync automation from the incident layout; the automation resets this field after it runs
